sources.title: Korean Civil Execution Act curated enforcement precondition references
sources.statute_ref: Civil Execution Act: enforceable title, execution clause, and attachment restriction references

sources.title: Korean debtor rehabilitation and bankruptcy curated collection hold references
sources.statute_ref: Debtor Rehabilitation and Bankruptcy Act: bankruptcy, rehabilitation, discharge, and stay references

sources.title: Recova v0 privacy and credit-information purpose rule source
sources.statute_ref: Personal Information Protection Act and Credit Information Use and Protection Act purpose-limitation references

rules.blocked_reason: A legally material fact is missing source document, chunk, or span provenance.
rules.recommended_action: Return the fact to extraction or reviewer repair before relying on legal checks.
required_preconditions: Every blocking or material fact has document_id, source_ref, chunk_id, and line span.

rules.blocked_reason: Execution clause proof is absent or not source-backed.
rules.recommended_action: Collect service/finality proof and execution clause evidence before recommending enforcement.
statute_refs: Civil Execution Act: execution title and execution clause references

rules.blocked_reason: Insolvency, discharge, rehabilitation, or credit recovery material exists and needs legal review.
rules.recommended_action: Review proceeding status and protected period before collection recommendations.
statute_refs: Debtor Rehabilitation and Bankruptcy Act: stay and discharge references

rules.blocked_reason: Limitation or stale-claim risk is not cleared by source-backed evidence.
rules.recommended_action: Verify limitation period, interruption, and calculation dates before action.
statute_refs: Civil Act and Civil Execution Act: limitation and enforceability references

rules.blocked_reason: Attachment target or priority material indicates exemption/protection review is required.
rules.recommended_action: Review target class, protected amount, and priority before collection recommendations.
statute_refs: Civil Execution Act: prohibited and protected attachment target references

rules.blocked_reason: Assignment or succession packet lacks complete notice and succession authority proof.
rules.recommended_action: Collect source-backed assignment notice and succession authority before treating creditor ownership as cleared.
statute_refs: Civil Execution Act: succession execution clause and creditor succession references

rules.blocked_reason: Claim, principal, or calculated total amounts conflict.
rules.recommended_action: Reconcile ledger and amount-interest calculation before recommending a collection amount.
statute_refs: Civil Execution Act: claim amount and attachment scope references

rules.blocked_reason: Party identity resolution remains uncertain or name-only.
rules.recommended_action: Resolve party_identity_key evidence before relying on debtor or creditor matching.

rules.blocked_reason: No enforceable title document type is present.
rules.recommended_action: Collect payment order, judgment, decision, settlement, or equivalent title evidence.
statute_refs: Civil Execution Act: enforceable title references

rules.blocked_reason: A required document cannot be classified safely.
rules.recommended_action: Send the document to governance review before legal-risk use.

rules.blocked_reason: A document type is outside the v0 StopGate support set and cannot be treated as cleared.
rules.recommended_action: Route unsupported document evidence to ontology governance before allowing legal checks to pass.
statute_refs: Domain contract: governance review for unsupported evidence

rules.blocked_reason: The StopGate rule source is draft, reviewed-only, deprecated, superseded, or otherwise not approved for production checks.
rules.recommended_action: Promote an approved static rule-source version before allowing production StopGates to clear.
